projects.title: Sales Performance Dashboard
projects.shortDescription: Interactive dashboard analyzing quarterly sales trends across multiple regions
projects.fullDescription: A comprehensive sales analytics dashboard that provides real-time insights into sales performance, regional trends, and key performance indicators. This dashboard serves as the primary tool for the sales leadership team to track progress and identify opportunities.
projects.challenge: The sales team was spending over 20 hours per week manually compiling reports from multiple data sources. There was no real-time visibility into performance metrics, leading to delayed decision-making.
projects.solution: Developed an interactive Tableau dashboard that automatically pulls data from the CRM and displays key metrics including revenue trends, top performers, pipeline status, and regional comparisons. Implemented drill-down functionality for detailed analysis.
projects.impact: Reduced reporting time by 75%, enabled daily performance tracking instead of weekly, and identified $2M in untapped revenue opportunities through advanced analytics.

projects.title: Customer Segmentation Analysis
projects.shortDescription: Power BI dashboard for customer behavior analysis and segmentation
projects.fullDescription: Advanced customer analytics platform built in Power BI that segments customers based on purchasing behavior, lifetime value, and engagement patterns. Provides actionable insights for targeted marketing campaigns.
projects.challenge: Marketing campaigns were using a one-size-fits-all approach, resulting in low conversion rates and wasted budget. No clear understanding of customer segments existed.
projects.solution: Built a Power BI dashboard using Python for clustering analysis and DAX for complex calculations. Created five distinct customer segments with detailed profiles, purchasing patterns, and recommended engagement strategies.
projects.impact: Increased marketing campaign ROI by 45%, improved customer retention by 23%, and enabled personalized marketing strategies for each segment.

projects.title: Financial KPI Tracker
projects.shortDescription: Real-time financial metrics dashboard for executive leadership
projects.fullDescription: Executive dashboard providing at-a-glance view of critical financial KPIs including revenue, expenses, profit margins, cash flow, and budget variance. Designed for C-suite consumption with mobile-responsive design.
projects.challenge: Executive team received financial reports on a monthly basis, often 2-3 weeks delayed. No ability to drill into specific areas of concern quickly.
projects.solution: Created a real-time financial dashboard with automated data refresh every morning. Implemented alert system for KPIs exceeding thresholds and enabled mobile access for executives on the go.
projects.impact: Executives now have daily financial visibility, reduced month-end closing time by 40%, and identified cost-saving opportunities worth $1.5M annually.

projects.title: Inventory Optimization Tool
projects.shortDescription: Python-powered analytics tool for inventory management and forecasting
projects.fullDescription: A Python-based analytical tool that predicts optimal inventory levels based on historical sales data, seasonality, and market trends. Integrates with existing ERP system and provides visualizations in Tableau.
projects.challenge: Company was experiencing frequent stockouts of high-demand items while maintaining excess inventory of slow-moving products, tying up capital and warehouse space.
projects.solution: Developed Python scripts using pandas and scikit-learn to analyze 3 years of sales data, identify patterns, and predict optimal stock levels. Created Tableau visualization to monitor inventory health and receive restock alerts.
projects.impact: Reduced stockouts by 65%, decreased excess inventory by 30%, and freed up $800K in working capital.

projects.title: HR Analytics Dashboard
projects.shortDescription: Employee metrics and workforce analytics in Power BI
projects.fullDescription: Comprehensive HR dashboard tracking employee satisfaction, turnover rates, hiring funnel metrics, diversity statistics, and performance indicators. Helps HR team make data-driven talent decisions.
projects.challenge: HR team had no centralized view of workforce metrics. Turnover analysis was reactive rather than predictive, and diversity initiatives lacked measurable tracking.
projects.solution: Built Power BI dashboard integrating HRIS data with survey results and performance data. Created turnover prediction model and diversity tracking across departments and levels.
projects.impact: Identified early warning signs for at-risk employees, improved retention by 18%, and provided data-driven insights for diversity and inclusion initiatives.

projects.title: Supply Chain Visibility Dashboard
projects.shortDescription: End-to-end supply chain monitoring and analytics platform
projects.fullDescription: Real-time supply chain dashboard tracking shipments, supplier performance, lead times, and logistics costs. Provides visibility into the entire supply chain from order to delivery.
projects.challenge: Supply chain team had no visibility into shipment status, supplier performance was not measured, and delivery delays were discovered reactively causing customer service issues.
projects.solution: Integrated data from multiple logistics providers into a single Tableau dashboard. Created supplier scorecards, shipment tracking, and automated alerts for delays.
projects.impact: Improved on-time delivery rate from 82% to 96%, reduced supplier-related issues by 40%, and improved customer satisfaction scores.
